nasb.text: so that your days and the days of your sons may be multiplied on the land which the Lord swore to your fathers to give them, as long as the heavens remain above the earth.

esv.text: that your days and the days of your children may be multiplied in the land that the Lord swore to your fathers to give them, as long as the heavens are above the earth.

cnv.text: 為要叫你們和你們的子孫的日子，在耶和華向你們列祖起誓應許給他們的地上，可以增多，像天覆地的年日那樣多。

ccb.text: 这样，你们及子孙就可以生活在耶和华起誓赐给你们祖先的土地上，与天地同长。
